/usr/bin/ar qc libmocks.a CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/fatfs.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/fff_globals.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_adc_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_fdcan_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_gpio_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_i2c_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_timer_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/hal_uart_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/semphr.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/stm32h7xx_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/task.c.o CMakeFiles/mocks.dir/mocks/timers.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmocks.a
